title: Monorepo + pnpm + TS/ESM + CI (build/lint/schema-validate) skeleton
context: Benefits-Navigator is an openly-licensed corpus of plain-language, primary-source-cited, multilingual, accessible guides to public-assistance programs (SNAP, Medicaid/CHIP, WIC, TANF, LIHEAP, SSI, housing, EITC, Lifeline/ACP), delivered as a static site, printable PDFs, and structured data with an optional retrieval-grounded explainer. It is a HIGH risk-tier project: it provides information, not legal/benefits advice, never makes an individualized eligibility determination, and always routes people to the official application and free human help. No partner, credentialed reviewer, or requestor is yet secured. This task stands up the monorepo skeleton (pnpm workspaces, TypeScript/ESM, CI) so all later code and content tasks have a green build/lint/schema-validate baseline to build on.
objective: Create the pnpm + TypeScript/ESM monorepo skeleton with CI running build, lint, and schema validation.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm workspaces + TypeScript/ESM project scaffold builds cleanly (pnpm build) with lint configured (pnpm lint)
CI workflow runs build, lint, and schema-validate on every PR and is green on the skeleton
Repository layout documented (packages/apps/content/output) so later tasks have a defined home
